case_title: MEHRANI, ARMAN YELLOW AIRPORTER EXPRESS VS GRAND AUTO # 062 et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MEHRANI, ARMAN YELLOW AIRPORTER EXPRESS AS TO DEFENDANT GRAND AUTO # 062 BONDED MOTORS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-06-1998 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GRAND AUTO # 062
DEFT.GRAND AUTO FILING CONTO FOR 9/4 1:30PM,PAID $CHECK(CAL:20-0),SENT OFR COMM.SIG.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-06-1998, CONTINUED BY COURT TO SEP-04-1998 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-04-1998, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-23-1998 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-23-1998, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-08-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT GRAND AUTO # 062 BONDED MOTORS PARTIES HAVE SETTLED AS FOLLOWS: BONDED MOTORS IS TO PROVIDE A REBUILT ENGINE TO BE INSTALLED IN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PLFT'S VEHICLE BY A BONDED MOTORS AGENT AT NO COST TO PLFT. ENGINE HAS 30 DAY WARRANTY. BASED ON THIS SETTLEMENT, CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE.
